name: Next Gen Golf Sim and Rentals
about: NextGen Golf Sim and Rentals offers a comprehensive entertainment experience combining golf simulation with event rentals and tanning services. The venue features multiple simulator bays equipped with advanced technology for golfers of all skill levels. It provides a flexible environment for individual practice, group events, and casual outings with a full bar available for patrons.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple simulator bays for group play
Event rental capabilities for group outings
Combination of golf and other entertainment services

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: A full bar is available on-site, outside food policies not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Kid-friendliness not specified; contact venue for details on age restrictions and policies.
